name: Imperator
description: A long range rifle capable of firing in space, the Imperator's versatility makes it an ideal weapon for space combat.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of Veilbreaker: Hotfix 32.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed offset issues with the Phased Asa, Asa, Glistor, Mozi, Synkra, and Imperator Festive Syandanas when equipped on the Nightwave Drifter Suit.

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Imperator Vandal preview not showing up in the Codex if you do not own it.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Imperator Festive Syandana attaching to Octavia Prime's back, not her neck like the other Imperator Syandanas.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed high GPU Effects time when shooting Profit Taker's legs with the Imperator Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed scaling issue with the Imperator Vandal’s muzzle smoke FX in Railjack missions.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance when using the Imperator Vandal in Railjack.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the hit-scan tracers from Imperator Vandal as it's now a projectile weapon.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Imperator GPU particles moving towards the camera.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Fulmin (only when reduced to below 10 rounds on Semi-Auto firing mode), Flux Rifle, Kitguns with the 'Gaze' Chamber type and Pax Charge Arcane, Imperator/Vandal, Cycron, and Larkspur not recharging correctly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Imperator Vandal not rendering properly as an Arch Gun when using certain Skins or no Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.2 + 25.0.2.1
patchlogs.additions: Imperator and Veritux are in the works to also be added

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.11
patchlogs.changes: Returned the Imperator Vandal Critical Chance to 15% and Status Chance to 10% in Archwing mode.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.8
patchlogs.changes: Performance improvements related to firing the Imperator.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.6
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Imperator and Imperator Vandal reload sounds playing non-positional.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.1 - 22.17.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
Imperator Vandal Barrel          Uncommon (11.28%)
Imperator Vandal Receiver     Uncommon (11.28%)
Imperator Vandal Blueprint     Common (38.72%)

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.changes:
•    Imperator Vandal parts are now tradable!
The Imperator Vandal Blueprint is now tradable.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Imperator Syandana sitting high on the neck of many Warframes.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Day of the Dead Imperator Skin not showing an appropriate description in the Market. WOOOOOOO SPOOKY GHOST LEAK

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Imperator Vandal not displaying proper energy display color.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Imperator! A long range rifle capable of firing in space, the Imperator's versatility makes it an ideal weapon for space combat.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.0.6+13.0.7+13.0.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Improved the positioning of the Imperator Syandana to fit better on Oberon's back.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Imperator Syandana appearing on Banshee’s waist.
